nickname.label: What should your companion call you?
nickname.hint: You can name your AI companion after registration

settings.title: Settings

model.hint: Choose the AI model that powers {companion}

kb.hint: Enable psychology knowledge for deeper emotional support

voice.title: 🔊 AI Voice Reply
voice.desc: AI auto-replies with voice when you send voice messages
voice.hint: Powered by Fish Audio — 2M+ community voices

search.placeholder: Search voices... e.g. anime, deep, sweet

voice.no_results: No voices found. Try different keywords.

companion.hint: Changes will update your companion's personality

custom.title: 🔮 Custom Settings
custom.hint: Customize personality and import knowledge independently

persona.title: Character Personality
persona.placeholder: Enter a character name (e.g., Rem, Ganyu) or describe personality. To rename, tap the name next to the avatar.

lore.title: Knowledge Base
lore.placeholder: Paste background materials, world settings, specialized knowledge, etc.
lore.hint: 💡 The more background info you import, the more accurately the AI embodies the character.
lore.delete_confirm: Remove this document from knowledge base?

settings.importZipHint: ZIP files import all conversations. For selective import, use the .json file inside.

welcome.title: Welcome back!
welcome.subtitle: Start a conversation with your AI companion. I'm here to chat, help, and keep you company.

file.unsupported: Unsupported file type. Supported: images, TXT, MD, CSV, JSON

error.network: Connection error. Please check your network.

password.length: Password must be at least 6 characters

reminder.title: Discover Your Soul Match
reminder.message: Take a quick personality test so your companion can truly understand you.

draw.title: Your Soul Reading
draw.subtitle: Click each card to reveal your destiny

naming.title: Give your companion a name
naming.subtitle: You can always change it later in settings

v218.1: Real-time rendered glassmorphism UI — sidebar, chat, modals, input bar all upgraded with unified theme
v218.2: Smoother modal open/close animations, overall layout alignment improvements
v218.3: Fixed image generation occasionally failing after multiple consecutive generations
v218.4: Removed daily image generation limit — generate as many as you want

v217.1: Avatar cropping — drag, zoom, and precisely crop your avatar after uploading
v217.2: Custom chat background — upload your own images as chat wallpaper
v217.3: User-uploaded images are now permanently saved, no longer lost on page refresh
v217.4: Image viewer zoom — double-click, pinch, or scroll wheel to zoom in on images

v216.1: Image engine upgrade — better quality! But server costs went up too... please support us 💸
v216.2: Smart anime detection — Genshin, Re:Zero and other anime characters auto-match anime art style
v216.3: Unlimited images per message (previously limited to 2)
v216.4: Fixed AI internal reasoning occasionally leaking into chat bubbles
v216.5: Fixed connection timeout during image generation

v215.1: Memory engine upgrade — switched from full memory dump to semantic search, AI now recalls only the most relevant memories for each message
v215.2: Every message now automatically extracts and saves key facts — your name, hobbies, preferences, family, work, life events
v215.3: Core memories (name, family, job) are always remembered; temporary events (next week's interview) auto-expire after 14 days

v214.1: Image generation upgrade — smarter character matching, imported characters are now accurately depicted
v214.2: WeChat-style multi-bubble — AI replies auto-split into chat bubbles + image generating placeholder
v214.3: Fixed image tags leaking as raw text during streaming replies

v213.1: Psychology knowledge base — AI references professional resources for deeper emotional support (toggle in Settings)
v213.2: Stress-relief mini games — Breathing guide, Bubble Pop, Zen Sand, Color Mix, Shape Catcher
v213.3: Ambient sound mixer — 13 preset nature & lo-fi sounds with individual volume control
v213.4: Server upgrade — doubled memory for faster and more stable responses
v213.5: Improved connection stability for overseas users — async streaming with auto-retry
v213.6: Fixed Gemini thinking content not showing in thinking bubble

v212.2: Instant voice bubble — WeChat-style, appears immediately after recording
v212.3: Voice call no longer causes short text replies in subsequent chats

v211.1: Voice call — Gemini Live-style full-screen call with auto voice detection, interruption & auto-play
v211.2: Streaming text chat — AI replies appear word by word in real-time, typewriter effect
v211.3: Input bar button redesign — unified icon style, call button moved to input area
v211.4: Reply speed boost — streaming transmission + parallel voice synthesis, reduced wait time

v200.1: Fish Audio TTS — all-new voice engine, 2M+ community voices available
v200.2: Voice picker — 8 preset voices per language + community search, preview & use
v200.3: Settings tabs — Profile / Companion / Advanced three-panel layout
v200.4: ChatGPT history import — bring your old conversations into SoulLink
v200.5: Click model badge in chat header to jump to model settings
v200.6: Voice presets refresh in real-time when switching language

v1100.1: Dual image engine — added Flux as backup, image generation more reliable

v190.1: Gemini 3 Flash — upgraded AI engine, smarter & more expressive replies
v190.2: GPT-4o smart switch hint — auto-suggests Grok when GPT replies are short or refused
v190.3: Richer AI replies — no more one-liners, conversations feel more real
v190.4: Fixed Gemini thinking content occasionally leaking into chat

v180.1: AI image generation — your companion can now send selfies & scene photos
v180.2: Character appearance matching — images auto-match your character's look
v180.3: Images saved to cloud — persist after refresh, click to fullscreen
v180.4: Voice messaging — record and send voice, AI understands your speech
v180.5: AI voice reply — enable in settings, AI replies with voice too
v180.7: Voice toggle in settings — enable/disable AI voice reply anytime

v170.1: Custom character persona — enter a character name, AI auto-searches & extracts personality
v170.2: Multi-file knowledge base — upload up to 10 docs, each independently manageable
v170.3: Relationship toggle — choose Lover or Friend mode for your companion
v170.4: Knowledge base file list with per-item delete
v170.5: Show estimated wait time during persona extraction
v170.6: Lock settings modal during extraction to prevent accidental close
v170.7: Switching gender now requires re-selecting companion style
v170.9: Fixed Grok immersion rules lost on style change
v170.10: Fixed blank persona for users who skipped personality test

v160.1: Name your companion during registration — make them truly yours
v160.2: Choose your AI model at signup — Gemini, GPT-4o, or Grok
v160.3: Skip personality test — jump straight into chatting, take it later anytime
v160.4: Auto-resize chat input — expands as you type, like WeChat
v160.5: Increased chat memory to 30 messages for deeper conversations
v160.6: Redesigned model selector with official brand icons

v140.1: File upload in chat — send images & documents to AI
v140.2: AI Thinking Process — see Gemini's reasoning before it replies (Gemini only)
v140.3: Markdown rendering — AI replies now show bold, headings, lists & more
v140.4: WeChat-style timestamps — time separators auto-appear between messages
v140.5: Grok 4.1 — a more intimate & unfiltered companion experience
v140.6: Fixed Gemini thinking content leaking into chat replies

v150.1: Fixed model switch losing memory & relationship data
v150.2: Fixed new workspaces defaulting to wrong AI provider
v150.3: Enhanced Gemini thinking content filter for edge cases

v130.1: AI Memory (Basic) — your companion can now remember key facts about you
v130.2: Trust Device — stay logged in for 90 days, no more repeated logins
v130.3: Chat background picker — 15 curated wallpapers to choose from
v130.4: Companion gender & personality — boyfriend or girlfriend with 4 unique styles
v130.5: AI auto-generates conversation titles based on chat content
v130.6: Smarter session handling & major stability improvements
v130.7: Web Search — AI can now search the internet for real-time weather, news & more

v120.1: About & Feedback page with donation support (Zelle / WeChat / Alipay)
v120.2: Custom companion avatar — click to upload your own image
v120.3: Smart companion rename — rename via chat conversation
v120.4: Personality test now has close button

v110.1: AI model selection — switch between GPT-4o & Gemini

v100.3: Real-time AI chat with personalized companion

about.description: SoulLink is an AI companion platform that creates meaningful connections through personalized conversations. Built with love by the SoulForge team.

support.desc: If you enjoy SoulLink, consider buying us a coffee!

community.desc: Join our WeChat group for updates, feedback & discussion!

survey.desc: Help us improve — take our quick 4-5 min survey!

popup.title: Join Our Community
popup.desc: Scan to join our WeChat group for updates & feedback!

announcement.community: 💬 Join our WeChat community for updates & feedback!

browser.hint: 🌐 For the best experience, we recommend using Safari or Chrome

error.mic_denied: Cannot access microphone. Please check permissions.

voicecall.feature_gate: Please enable "Voice Reply" and select a voice in Settings first to use voice call
